notes: No dedicated Wikipedia article found (404). Web search returned descriptive content emphasizing terrain parks/freestyle progression rather than traditional run counts. No fabricated values.

Wikipedia article on Yellowstone Club describes terrain qualitatively (2,200 acres, Pioneer Ridge double-blacks, intermediate Andesite Mountain) but gives no run count or percentages. Bestsnow.net terrain analysis table reports beginner 12% / intermediate 42% / advanced 27% / expert 16% / varied 3% (sums 100%). Note: data is from 2001 and may not reflect current expanded terrain — flagged in notes for downstream verification.
